revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Pages with incorrect translated page tag" to "Pages with translated page tag"
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
